steps.title: Check Grasp Belt Tension
steps.instructions: Using the belt tension meter, check the Grasp Belt tension, ensuring the Hz reading is between 76-86Hz.

steps.title: Move Mobile Jaw
steps.instructions: Move the Mobile Jaw up and down. It should move smoothly without much resistance.

steps.title: Move blade in and out
steps.instructions: Slide blade in and out. This should be smooth without much resistance.

steps.title: Check pulley covers (final inspector only)
steps.instructions: Ensure plastic pully enclosure covers are installed correctly and undamaged.

steps.title: Set mobile jaw driven belt tension
steps.instructions:
Using the Imada tensioning tool, set mobile jaw driven belt tension to 2Kgf. Take a picture of the reading when complete.

Instructions: https://quip-amazon.com/IsAaAKAtViyA#edW9AAKmD48

steps.title: Set Fixed Jaw driven belt tension
steps.instructions:
Using the Imada tensioning tool, set Fixed Jaw driven belt tension to 2Kgf. Take a picture of the reading when complete.

Instructions: https://quip-amazon.com/IsAaAKAtViyA#edW9AAKmD48

steps.title: Set blade driven belt tension
steps.instructions:
Using the Imada tensioning tool, set blade driven belt tension to 2Kgf. Take a picture of the reading when complete.

Instructions: https://quip-amazon.com/IsAaAKAtViyA#edW9AAKmD48

steps.title: Check Mobile Jaw wearbed
steps.instructions: Check Mobile Jaw wearbed is acceptable, ensuring all air pockets are removed.

steps.title: Check Static Jaw wearbed
steps.instructions: Check Static Jaw wearbed is acceptable, ensuring all air pockets are removed.

steps.title: Check motors
steps.instructions: Ensure all motors are firmly fastened to the EoAT.

steps.title: Adjust blade belt tension
steps.instructions: Using the 0.3Nm T10, remove the pluck cover. Next, turn on the Belt Tension Meter and hold it against the blade belt window. Using a hex key, pluck the blade belt on its top side and record the measurement. Adjust as needed until ±81Hz reading is achieved.

steps.title: Set Static Jaw conveyor tension
steps.instructions:
Set Static Jaw conveyor tension to .03lbs.

Instructions: https://quip-amazon.com/fiiLAW1GmpUt/Conveyor-Belt-Tensioner-Instructions

steps.title: Set Mobile Jaw conveyor tension
steps.instructions:
Set Mobile Jaw conveyor tension to .05lbs.

Instructions: https://quip-amazon.com/fiiLAW1GmpUt/Conveyor-Belt-Tensioner-Instructions

steps.title: Ensure all visible fasteners are installed and marked with a paint pen
steps.instructions: Ensure all visibile fasteners are installed and marked with a paint pen, and that no fasteners are stripped.

steps.title: Check Futek fastener
steps.instructions: Ensure Futek fastener on the mobile jaw has loctite.

steps.title: Check fiducial plates
steps.instructions: Ensure both fiducial plates are mounted properly.

steps.title: Check all electrical connections
steps.instructions: Ensure all electrical connections on the EoAT are secure. (If any are found to be lose, hand tighten them until secure)

steps.title: Check for wrist mount locating pin
steps.instructions: Ensure the wrist mount locating pin is set.

steps.title: Are you comfortable shipping this EoAT?
steps.instructions: Are you comfortable shipping this EoAT?

steps.title: Profile photo 1
steps.instructions: Take picture from L profile view camera.
